mappings.control_name: Protect all code from unauthorised access — training data and pipelines
mappings.notes: Protect training data repositories, fine-tuning datasets, and ML pipeline code from unauthorised read, write, and modification

mappings.control_name: Archive and protect software releases — model versioning
mappings.notes: Maintain versioned, integrity-verified training data snapshots and model checkpoints in a secure model registry; enable rollback

mappings.control_name: Reuse existing well-secured software — dataset vetting
mappings.notes: Vet all third-party and external training datasets for provenance, integrity, and potential poisoning before use in any training run

mappings.control_name: Analyse root causes — training data forensics
mappings.notes: When poisoning is detected, conduct training data analysis to identify the poisoned records, their source, and the blast radius

mappings.control_name: Supply Chain Risk Management Plan — AI data sources
mappings.notes: Include AI training data sources, fine-tuning datasets, and pre-trained model weights in the supply chain risk management plan; document provenance and risk assessment for each

mappings.control_name: Supply Chain Controls and Processes — model provenance
mappings.notes: Implement supply chain controls for AI model components — verify integrity, provenance, and authenticity of all training data and model weights before use

mappings.control_name: Malicious Code Protection — training pipeline integrity
mappings.notes: Extend malicious code protection to training data pipelines; detect and block poisoned data, anomalous labels, and backdoor triggers

mappings.control_name: Configuration Change Control — model update governance
mappings.notes: Require formal change control for all model updates, fine-tuning runs, and training data changes; maintain audit trail of all modifications

mappings.control_name: Third-Party Risk — AI data and model provider oversight
mappings.notes: Include AI model providers and training data vendors in third-party ICT risk oversight; assess data provenance, integrity, and poisoning risk

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — training pipeline integrity
mappings.notes: Implement security controls protecting training data pipelines from unauthorised modification, poisoned data injection, and backdoor embedding
Identify and classify all AI training datasets, fine-tuning data, and model weights as ICT assets in the asset inventory
Conduct post-incident analysis for data poisoning events; identify root cause, trace poisoned records, and update protection controls
